kernel: entry_state.py (audited reference kernel; exact reproduction of bit_literal_target verified to 5 decimals)

primary_config.alphabet: constant {single:00(2b), a1:01(2b), a2:100(3b), a3:101, a4:110, a5:111} — Kraft=1, one alphabet for all passes (no epoch dependence for parsing)
primary_config.jumpstarter: J2D1 (per-file profile constant; min record 6 bits; payload cap 28; depth 29)
primary_config.expansion: content-only (unsalted) — dice need no pass key

decode_dependency.needs: bundle birth-epoch inference via affine-stride fingerprint (handoff-v2 obligation 1) + charged escape ledger ~T/N per bundle
decode_dependency.does_not_need: arity-1 epochs: arity-1 replacements preserve sequence length (1->1), so the permutation unwind is insensitive to their birth pass; their dice are content-keyed (no salt)
decode_dependency.singles_epoch_channel: unknown — this is why the scheduled-alphabet rows are CONDITIONAL

evidence_class: math_candidate (decode pending the stride-induction proof; primitives BIT_LITERAL/LITERAL_RUN wire-proven; 2-bit single is BIT_LITERAL with a different codeword spend)
